<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Linked issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature

## Checklist

- [ ] Tied to an accepted issue (`Closes #…`)
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
